name: ralph-loop
description: Repeatable multi-LLM codebase hardening sweeps: map under-reviewed surfaces, patch fixes, document learnings, and loop.

interface.shortDescription: Repeatable multi-LLM codebase hardening sweeps: map under-reviewed surfaces, patch fixes, document learnings, and loop.
interface.longDescription: Repeatable multi-LLM codebase hardening sweeps: map under-reviewed surfaces, patch fixes, document learnings, and loop. Works well in repo-local and Codex cloud workflows that operate on a checked-out repository.
defaultPrompt: Run a RALPH loop over this repo: map the next under-reviewed surfaces, get multi-LLM review, apply high-confidence fixes, document findings, and tell me the next sweep frontier.
